purpose: Parses a JSON array of user records, filters valid entries by id/displayName/email, normalizes fields (trim/lowercase), extracts email domain, groups users by domain, sorts each group alphabetically, and produces grouped data with summary statistics.

functions.name: processUserData
functions.purpose: Main pipeline: validate, filter, normalize, group, sort, stats

functions.name: filter validator
functions.purpose: Check if item has id, name, and email

functions.name: transform mapper
functions.purpose: Normalize fields: trim, lowercase, extract domain, format date

functions.name: sortGroup
functions.purpose: Sort each domain group alphabetically by displayName

dataFlow: JSON string → parse → filter (id/name/email) → map (normalize fields, extract domain) → group by domain → sort groups → compute stats → output
